session.user:
Run these commands and report results:
1. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && python -m ruff check --fix src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py tests/commands/test_reconcile.py 2>&1`
2. `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && python -m ruff format src/erk/cli/constants.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/land_execute.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py tests/commands/test_reconcile.py 2>&1`
3. Then re-check: `cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && python -m ruff check src/erk/cli/constants.py src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/land_execute.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py tests/commands/test_reconcile.py 2>&1`
Report any remaining errors.
session.assistant: I'll normalize these commands to use `uv run` and execute them:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check --fix src/erk/cli/commands/land_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_pipeline.py src/erk/cli/commands/reconcile_cmd.py tests/commands/test_reconcile.py 2>&1
Ruff check with fixes on specified files

tool_use.name: Bash

session.assistant:
Excellent! Here's the summary:

**Command 2 - Ruff format:** - 1 file reformatted: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/constants.py` - 5 files left unchanged
